envoy_id.description: Stable identifier for this Envoy in the federation. Appears in AS-PATH.

advertise_listen.description: host:port to serve /advertisements on for peer cluster-router processes.

target_cluster_source.description: Where to read the target cluster name from on each request. The `metadata` source is reserved for a future release and rejected at runtime.

target_cluster_header.description: Request header name when target_cluster_source is `header`.

next_hop_header.description: Header name written by the filter for `cluster_header` routes.

peers.description: Outbound peers this Envoy pulls advertisements from and routes traffic to.

local_cluster.description: Name of the local Envoy cluster that routes data-plane traffic to this peer.

terminals.description: Local cluster names this Envoy fronts as terminal destinations and advertises to peers.

poll_interval.description: How often to pull peer advertisements (Go duration). Must be >= 100ms.

stale_after.description: Drop routes from a peer whose last successful sync is older than this (Go duration). Must be >= poll_interval.

metadata_namespace.description: Filter metadata namespace the plugin writes routing decisions (next_hop_cluster, target_cluster, distance, as_path) under. Defaults to "io.builtonenvoy.cluster_router" if not set.
